---
title: "Index"
author: Roberto Barbante"
date: "2026-07-19"
output: html_document
[View project on GitHub](https://github.com/robertobarbante/adabi-portfolio-project-ML_Farmaci)
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

# Roberto Barbante

## Machine Learning Portfolio
I'am a graduate in Political Science and current student of one-year specializing Master’s programme in Data Analysis for Business Intelligence and Data Science (Adabi).

## Featured Project

### Drug name prediction
Progetto di classificazione per identificare il nome di un farmaco partendo da 
feature del pazione (età, condizione e genere).

[View project on GitHub] https://github.com/robertobarbante/adabi-portfolio-project-ML_Farmaci

## Skills
Python, Pandas, RStudio, Scikit-learn, Data Visualization, Model Evaluation, SAS, Data cleaning and preprocessing
